overall.description: Third-person gameplay from The Witcher 3 featuring Geralt of Rivia journeying through a scenic wilderness at sunset. The character walks along a misty riverbank, swims across the water, and continues into a dense forest illuminated by dramatic golden hour light and volumetric fog.

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking steadily along the grassy riverbank beside the calm water

entered.detail: calm greenish river water with gentle currents and reflections
dense line of deciduous trees along the opposite shore
tall grass and wildflowers covering the riverbank
misty forested hills visible in the background

segments.scene_description: Geralt walks along an open grassy riverbank during golden hour. The calm river flows to the left while the sun creates dramatic rays through the trees ahead. The terrain is covered in tall grass and wildflowers, with a dense tree line visible across the water.

events.description: character enters the river and begins swimming across toward the opposite bank
character reaches the far shore and exits the water onto grassy terrain

agents.ego_description: Geralt swimming through the river water with steady strokes toward the forested shore

entered.detail: rippling water surface at eye level with light reflections

segments.scene_description: The character enters the river and swims across the open water. The camera follows at water level, showing rippling green water surrounding Geralt as he approaches the distant tree-lined shore. The sun continues to backlight the scene from behind the forest.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense forest trail with tall pines

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking through the dense forest with sunlight streaming through the trees creating volumetric light rays

entered.detail: tall pine trees forming a dense canopy overhead
grass and undergrowth covering the forest ground
thick tree trunks passing by on both sides of the path

segments.scene_description: After exiting the water, Geralt continues walking through a dense forest. Tall trees surround the path with sunlight filtering through the canopy creating dramatic god rays. The ground is covered in grass and undergrowth as the character moves deeper into the wooded area.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from an open, sun-drenched riverbank into the depths of a dense, atmospheric forest. It begins with Geralt walking through tall grass and wildflowers along a calm river, where dramatic golden rays pierce through a distant tree line. As the character enters the water, the camera drops to water level, following him through rippling green currents toward the opposite shore. The scene then shifts as he exits the river and pushes forward into a thick woodland, where the open sky is replaced by a heavy canopy. Finally, the camera moves deeper into the forest, tracking through lush undergrowth as sunlight filters through the branches in sharp, volumetric god rays.
